description: Scan Google News and Hacker News for AI, automation, and SaaS trends. Produce a prioritized digest for marketing and product positioning.

topics.description: Topics to search. Default: AI agents, browser automation, OAuth, SaaS, enterprise AI.

steps.description: Navigate to Google News Technology section
Extract top tech articles from Google News
Navigate to Hacker News front page

steps.prompt:
You are a tech trends analyst for an AI SaaS startup (Solace AGI — browser automation with OAuth3 approvals). Analyze these articles and Hacker News posts. For each relevant story:
1. Headline + source
2. Why it matters for our positioning (browser automation, AI agents, enterprise security)
3. Actionable insight (blog post idea, feature idea, partnership opportunity)
4. Urgency: NOW (trending today), SOON (this week), WATCH (this month)

Prioritize stories about: AI agents, browser automation, OAuth/auth, SaaS growth, enterprise AI adoption, competitor moves (OpenAI, Anthropic, Microsoft Copilot, Bardeen, Browser-Use).

steps.description: Save trend report to outbox for review
